title: Cry Me a River
why_this_song: Cry Me a River by Justin Timberlake (2002) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "river" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "river" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You told me you loved me

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Cry Me a River" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Cry Me a River"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Timberlake one question about "Cry Me a River", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Timberlake sobre "Cry Me a River", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Cry Me a River" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Cry Me a River" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
